items.title: Boris FX releases Optics 2026.5 with AI-powered facial masking
items.excerpt: Boris FX Optics 2026.5 ships four AI tools for automatically masking parts of the human face, generating depth maps from photos, and denoising and upresing images — alongside expanded platform support for Affinity, Apple Photos, and Capture One.

items.title: KeyShot releases KeyShot 2026.2
items.excerpt: KeyShot 2026.2 adds GPU rendering on Apple Silicon, an integrated cloud rendering service (KeyShot Cloud), Node Groups in the material graph for reusable components, and glTF/GLB export compression that makes models 2–3x smaller.

items.title: Rethinking Figma in an AI World
items.excerpt: Figma's Config 2026 announcements — code layers, Figma Motion, shader tools, and an expanded AI agent — reveal the platform is no longer just defending its collaborative canvas but actively expanding into code-first, agentic software building to stay relevant.

items.title: AI didn't replace designers—it promoted them
items.excerpt: Rather than eliminating design roles, AI has elevated designers into higher-leverage positions — handling strategic direction, craft oversight, and quality control — as AI tools absorb routine production work.

items.title: Introducing Canva Grow 2.0: Create, Launch, and Optimize Ads in One Place
items.excerpt: Canva Grow 2.0, unveiled at Cannes Lions, expands Canva into a full AI-driven performance marketing platform where teams can create, publish, and optimize ad campaigns within a single design workspace — rolling out to users in North America, Australia, and the UK starting June 25.

items.title: Gstarsoft updates design portfolio across CAD and BIM
items.excerpt: Gstarsoft's updated GstarCAD 2027 and GstarBIM 2027 bring AI-assisted visualization, 2D-to-3D conversion, point cloud modeling, and cloud-native collaboration tools into a single connected design environment for CAD and BIM workflows.

items.title: What does Adobe's Topaz Labs acquisition mean for creatives?
items.excerpt: Adobe's planned acquisition of Topaz Labs will bring Topaz's Neurostream AI models for image upscaling, denoising, and enhancement directly into Photoshop, Lightroom, Firefly, and Creative Cloud apps, fundamentally changing on-device AI editing workflows for creatives.

items.title: How to build a landing page using GPT-5 Mini + MUI with UXPin Merge
items.excerpt: A step-by-step workflow tutorial shows how designers can use GPT-5 Mini with the MUI React component library inside UXPin Merge to generate production-ready landing page UI from natural language prompts — without writing raw code.
